reason: Backend checklist and KGTraceVis invariants for implementing noise, metrics, and scripts.
Keeps reusable noise/metric logic under src/kgtracevis and scripts as clients.
Metrics and experiments consume KG-backed source edge/path contracts without changing KG facts.
Noise and metrics should handle invalid or empty data deterministically and explicitly.
Defines pytest, ruff, mypy, and example-run quality gates.
Guides concise script output and avoids noisy experiment logging.
New metric helpers should avoid duplicated counting/ranking patterns.
Noise and metrics touch schema, pipeline results, scripts, and future experiment/UI layers.
